name: open-data
description: A bootstrapper for Open Data software.
author: Patryk Bujanowski <bujanowski.patryk@outlook.com>

scripts.dev:start: concurrently "cd client && yarn start" "cd api && yarn dev"
scripts.dev:install: yarn install && cd common && yarn install && cd .. && concurrently "cd client && yarn install" "cd api && yarn install"
scripts.dev:common-update: concurrently "cd client && yarn upgrade open-data-common" "cd api && yarn upgrade open-data-common"
scripts.build: concurrently "cd client && yarn build" "cd api && yarn build"
